author: PolarPandy
text: I fell in love with KCD2 from the first few frames...

author: Emi
text: Thank you for creating this amazing and beatiful story and for bringing so many people together with it.

author: Bilios
text:
Coming from a teen that's almost an adult and had his teenage years flooded by KCD, I couldn't be more thankful. I was born and raised in Spain, but having Czech parents only brought Czech culture to me growing up. I discovered the game thanks to Xbox Gamepass back in 2020 and I fell in love with the game even before finding out it was made by a Czech company and had a medieval Bohemia setting. Five years later I finally had the chance to explore both KCD and KCD II's locations in real life while also visiting family in the Czech Republic, a trip my parents and I absolutely loved, as they always love a bit of Czech culture in media and a nice excuse to visit more of the country after living in a dry and 'brown' part of Spain for a few decades. 
 Much love, Warhorse! We are very thankful for everything you've done.

author: Peasant from Peasantstan
text: Dear, Warhorse team! I'd like to express my deepest gratitude for your work! KCD and KCD2 have become more than just games for me. They are now a part of my life and my inspiration. Thanks to you, I've not only rekindled my long-held dream of writing my own story, but I've also begun to realize it. And as a devoted yet patient fan, I'm ready to wait forever for the threequel.

author: Lopiz / Lorraine N.
text:
Dear Warhorse Studios Team, 
 I just wanted to thank you for the incredible experience you created with Kingdom Come: Deliverance. It’s not only an amazing game series in terms of storytelling, immersion, and historical depth, but it also had a truly meaningful impact on me. Through the world you built, I discovered a deeper appreciation for Central European history and culture. It even led me to travel to the Czech Republic multiple times, visit the locations that inspired the game, and reconnect with my creativity through new personal and artistic projects. 
 Your work has been genuinely inspiring and, in many ways, life-changing. It reminded me how powerful games can be in connecting people, cultures, and stories. Thank you for creating something so special. 
 Warm regards,  
 AUDENTES!

author: Nilanya
text: Thanks to Kingdom Come Deliverance I found an amazing community, even better friends, and made so many wonderful memories with them together (two concerts, many more gatherings, and soon two vacations). My life truly got better thanks to the world and the games Warhorse created! Thank you so much! <3

author: Shimmeren
text: Before KCD and KCD2 I had no idea how much I craved something fresh and unique, something without dragons, elves and magic. The world created by Warhorse became a true revelation to me - the story, the music, the voice acting, the attention to detail - every minute of gameplay felt like I was discovering the world of video games anew. Thank you for letting me experience this!

author: MT
text:
Found a home with a wicked people my age. I've never travelled to a country so much and in such short time. In my very busy life, KCD2 was a shining light. 
 Just getting into that world, feeling the sunshine and the wind, it satisfied my adventure soul. 
 All thanks to the amazing team at Warhorse studios.

author: Mitculka
text:
Moc děkuju za KCD 2! Doopravdy mi naprosto změnilo život. Předtím jsem nic nehrála, ani jsem neměla na čem, ale KCD 2 mě tak zaujalo, že jsem si půl roku od kamaráda půjčovala jeho druhý notebook, abych mohla hrát. Pak jsem dostala SteamDeck a najednou můžu hrát co chci a kdy chci (i KCD 1). Přidala se do celé té skvělé komunity, která kolem vaší úžasné hry vznikla. Můj život je tak jiný, že kdyby mi to někdo před rokem řekl, jen bych nevěřícně kroutila hlavou.
 Je to hra našich srdcí, pro mě osobně znamená strašně moc a miluju každý její aspekt – příběh, grafiku, hudbu, všechny vtípky i celé realistické ztvárněné české historie. Vidět Jindřicha běhat po mapě mě vždycky hřeje u srdce. Na Kutnohorsku a Trosecku se cítím doma, i když bydlím v Brně. 
 DĚKUJU! Udělali jste něco neskutečného.

author: VampyreGremlin
text: The game has been such a breath of fresh air. I'm so grateful it exists.

author: Pepper
text:
Kingdom Come: Deliverance II is a game that has certainly secured its place in the history of the RPG genre; its dedication to realism and historical authenticity created an experience that feels truly unique and will be remembered for years to come. 
 But its impact goes far beyond the game itself: thanks to its tribute to Czech history, it has sparked new waves of historical tourism from people all over the world, helped restore historical sites, and allowed history to be experienced in a modern world.
 KCD fans have nurtured a passionate community of inspiring, creative, and talented individuals who brought the game beyond the digital world and into real life, coming together to celebrate the game that we all love.

author: Liz_B
text: I could never imagine how much one game can change someone’s life. KCD2 is a true masterpiece in gaming industry which brought me so much joy I wish I can erase my memory and play it again. Thank you so much for it! It’s genuinely one of the best games of all time!

author: GlambringGaming
text:
To everyone at Warhorse Studios,
 I just wanted to say thank you. The Kingdom Come: Deliverance series has meant more to me than you’ll ever know.
 This past year has been really tough, and your game became a place I could escape to. The world you created feels so real — the music, landscapes, and people who feel like actual human beings rather than just characters.
 What drew me in most was the storytelling and humanity of the characters. They feel flawed, believable, and alive, and that made me fall in love with the franchise.
 And yes… even when you make me carry sacks, fetch things, or get skewered by someone better with a sword, it all adds to the charm and immersion.
 Thank you for creating something so grounded and full of heart. I can’t wait to see where the journey goes next.

author: Jessykitaa
text:
Thank you for creating a game with so much care. Its story, its atmosphere, and its music have impacted me like no game ever has before. For me, it has been an explosion of creativity, a way to meet new friends, and to expand my horizons like I never imagined. 
 Thank you for bringing to life a game that truly changes lives.

author: Queen of Pookies
text:
Dear Warhorse team, thank you for creating KCD and KCD2. These games have become so much more than just games for so many of us. I didn’t believe games could actually change lives, but yours did. They literally saved mine.  It’s amazing that you made something so grounded, immersive, and full of heart. Not every game can touch people this deeply. The Story, music, the living world of Bohemia, and flawed but real characters made it feel truly alive. For hundreds of hours we could all step into that medieval world, laugh, cry, and feel like we belonged there. You gave us something so special, so majestic, THANK YOU for all of it. 
 You all are the G.O.A.T! 
 Audentes fortuna iuvat!!!

author: Fountain 1403
text: Warhorse quickly gained a spot in the hearts of it's players because of the immediately clear care ,skill, and talent put forth by everyone involved. What they crafted is nothing short of groundbreaking, from the storyline to the visual language of the game, the immersion and mechanics, the humor and heart in the writing, and the consistant internal logic. It feels like a love letter to storytelling, to gamers, and to the preservation of history. I will never forget the moment I realized just how special this game is. Forever etched in my heart and soul. Thank you for the unparalleled experience. My love to you all. -Fountain 1403

author: Fletcher the Warlock
text:
Kingdom Come Deliverance 1 & 2 are more than just simple games. They're masterpieces, created with love for detail, dedication and hard work! The music, the story, the characters and the whole world you created in those games is stunningly beautiful! I'm glad I discovered these games, and I could totally lose myself in it.  
 Thank you all for your hard work, for creating the most beautiful games I ever played! 
 Games that brought together an amazing community I've never experienced before!  
 Your games truly changed not just my life but also the lifes of so many people!! I found new and wonderful friends, and had some of the most amazing days in my life since I dived into your amazing games!! 
 So THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING!!

author: The Charlatan
text: I'd like to express my gratitude to the Warhorse team - to each person whose hard work and dedication gave us this amazing top-tier game like KCD2. You are the most talented and great people that can't be replaced <3 <3 Much love, keep up good work and hopefully we'll see more of you in the future!

author: tam
text: Thank you for allowing a queer romance to exist in this game. It truly has meant everything to me. I've shipped Hans and Henry ever since I first played KCD1 back in 2018. Seeing that actually realized on the screen is more meaningful than I can properly express. So much so that when I first found out that they could be together, I started crying. Thank you for this.

author: NoOneFromYou
text: Miluju vaší videohru, první hra co jsem předobjednal a dohrál v rámci pár dní od vydání, po třech průchodech stále objevuju nové věci a místa. Skvělá videohra, jsem rád že jste byli schopni světu ukázat krásy naší země. Soundtrack absolutní masterpiece.

author: Sneezy
text: I really took my time with the game and fell in love with the world. Thank you for making my favorite rpg! <3

author: Toby T
text: I've played through both the first and second game and the attention to detail is amazing. Definitely one of my favourite series and can't wait to see what's next!

author: Ryu
text: I don't know what else to say besides your games are brilliant. Filled with interesting gameplay, story, characters and environment, I love every part of them. They've also introduced me to some great people through the community it's brought together. Thank you, Warhorse!

author: Erin
text:
A couple of days into playing KCD2, my brother asked me if I was enjoying it.  The answer I gave him was: 'I think it's my favorite game.'  After completing it, I can confirm that it is.  I've thought about this world and these characters every day for over a year now and I don't see that stopping any time soon.  Especially with the community I've found in the people that share that same love. 
 So, thank you. 
 For expanding Henry's already amazing coming of age story into something bigger and more morally complex, full of beautifully flawed characters with variety and depth.  For the clinking of Henry's armor and the satisfying sounds of rainstorms.  For the opportunity to have fun failing and, eventually, succeeding.  And for every other lovingly handcrafted detail in this game.

author: Nakuky
text: This game changed my life forever, helped me through difficult times, and i completely fell in love with it. Thank you Warhorse and every single soul behind both KCDs, i will continue to support you!

author: Cool Luke Dale
text: It’s an amazing game, everything about it makes it great from the gameplay, story, graphics and little Easter eggs. It truly is a Cool game.

author: Frostine
text:
Dear KCD2 team, 
 Every single hour, every ounce of creativity, and every idea you shared to create Kingdom Come: Deliverance and Kingdom Come: Deliverance II turned them into the masterpieces that they are today. 
 I hope you know that beyond entertainment and fun, you've brought real, positive change to the lives of your players. Your heartwork (and hard work) are the reasons why so many of us are bravely facing life today. I pray that whatever life may bring you, you continue to create knowing the kind of impact your hands, minds, and hearts are capable of. 
 JCBP! Audentes Fortuna Iuvat

author: It'sEmmy_2001
text: Thank you Warehouse for creating such an amazing game. It was thanks to this game that i learnt about the history of medieval Bohemia. Both games got me through some difficult time, thanks again.

author: V3NGFUL
text: I wasn't into the open-world RPG scene until I the discovered Kingdom Come: Deliverance saga. Then as I invested more time into it, Warhorse Studios did craft something special. Something that has never have been done before in all RPGs. The attention to detail in the story that is beautifully well-written, the developers couldn't have done a better job if they tried. No matter how many times I play the games, it has so much entertainment value and always feels like the first time I played them. Thanks to Kingdom Come: Deliverance, I have joined a wonderful and insightful community who is forever more passionate of the franchise. It really feels I have found a second home. Thank you Warhorse for making this spectacular series that has touched my heart in more ways than one!

author: Ems
text:
Thank you so much the amazing team of KCD2 for great this game. I’m honestly really grateful for the experience you created. 
 The world feels full and alive, and I loved how free I felt the whole time. I could go anywhere, do what I wanted, and play the game my own way. It didn’t feel forced, it felt natural, like I was part of it. 
 It brought me a lot of joy. I had so many moments where I just stopped and appreciated what you built.
 Thank you for all the work and care you put into this. It really shows.

author: Julie
text: Kcd and kcd2 has been such a joy for me in a dark time. I truly appreciate all the work that has been put into this game and to the workers who made it happen: Thank you! you are amazing, you made two incredible games that has given me hundreds of hours of joy. I love spending time in the games, taking in every detail and pondering on all the work that was put in. Well done! It is amazing how these games blossomed into such a wonderful fan community that do so much for eachother. <3

author: MasterOfAllChief
text: A HUGE Thank you to you to the team behind Warhorse, without you guys there will be no KCD1 and KCD2, everyone who made this game is full of passion and talents and you guys inspire me a lot when it comes to creativity and gave me motivation like no other game has this impactful in my gaming life. Its already been more than a year since KCD2 came out and I'm still talking about it, it really tells you this game it means a lot to me. I don't write this kind of stuff or any kind really, but it makes me want to write this to you. I really like most about the game is the story, Henry and Hans has the most natural romance/bromance that I ever seen in gaming history, along with the amazing music and all the characters you guys created. I deeply THANK YOU for the game. AUDENTES FORTUNA IUVAT

author: Eeyore
text: Thank you so much for a wonderful game.  It was a true masterpiece and I know that you all put your all into the game.  From a very grateful fan thank you for all your dedication, time and energy you put into the game that I love.

author: Micheline Took
text: I don’t even know where to begin, words can’t explain the help this game has brought me. I bought Kcd2 at release and started playing it, but stopped a few hours in because i was in the process of moving; which was quite a difficult period. I picked it back up a few months later when i was really going through it, struggling with mental illness and all that jazz. Kcd2 gave me a place where i could just sit down with myself, my cat and my controller and disappear into the game so I could momentarily have a place away from everything and give me the time and space which i desperately needed to just breathe and enjoy. I sincerely want to thank absolutely everyone involved in the making of kcd2 for the absolute joy and life you have breathed into this game, it has done wonders for me

author: Lalia
text: This isn't just about the game for me, not anymore. Hasn't been for a long time. It's also about the strong community. In this community, I have met many amazing people and found many new friends. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you for this!

author: Buckduck
text: I did not expect this game and the amazing storyline to make such a great impact on my life.  I started KCD2 first as it peaked my interest in graphics and music, but got hooked on how detailed and expressive the characters were written. The storyline, the history, every grasspetal in the fields just make sense and the character development is outstanding! Some characters made me feel seen as an individual struggling with mental health and sexuality, some characters made me understand light cannot shine without darkness and vice versa. Everything has a reason, and the morality of the characters makes it so divers and interesting. Behind every bad guy is a reason why he does it: a family, a traumatic past, all kinds of details we as 21th century humanbeings can relate to.

author: Jon B
text:
Dear Warhorse, 
 I want you to know you’re the reason I got a gaming PC after years of delaying it. I’ve always loved medieval history, and stepping into Bohemia 1403 left me in awe. I fell in love with the atmosphere, the music, the story, the characters, the dialogues... everything felt so cured, detailed, and special, unlike anything I had experienced before. 
 You also gave us Hansry, in my opinion the best slow-burn romance in gaming.
 Henry’s adventures will always stay with me, and these will forever be my comfort games. 
  Thank you to everyone involved for creating this masterpiece, and for engaging with fans so actively. We deeply appreciate you and couldn’t be happier to be here!! Please don't change, your passion is what makes you stand out in the game industry! 
 Audentes Fortuna Iuvat

author: Rogue_Ane
text: Hello, I'm from Brazil. I don't think I can fully express how incredible the game is. The actors, the voices, the visuals. The details of the story, the depth of the characters, including the villains. You gave us time to get to know them, but they're so good that I think that's not enough, I want more. A unique and talented team. The humor is perfect and balances very well with the tragic moments, sometimes mixing the two. Henry is a lovable hero. He's humble, kind, and the way they elevate him to a state of saintliness is perfect. A hero needs to be good and stand out from the others, and Henry embodies that very well. I love him and want keep following his journey. There's so much to tell in this rich world! Thank you from the bottom of my heart and please, KCD3! You birth the best IP.

author: Aiki Yukina
text:
Hry doprovází můj život již dlouhá léta. Dříve jsem netušila, že by mě mohla nějaká hra natolik oslovit, že bych jí věnovala celý rok svého života. KCD2 pro mě bylo změnou k lepšímu. Díky úžasné komunitě jsem našla mnoho nových přátel a zapojila se do mnoha nádherných akcí spojených s KCD tématikou.  
 Začala jsem víc cestovat a vážit si krásy naší země.  
 Velký dík patří všem vývojářům, kteří se podíleli na vzniku této dokonalé hry. Je to více než hra pro mnoho z nás a mnoho příběhů se obrátilo k lepšímu. Pomohlo v těžkých životních situacích. Děkujeme!

author: Mochinoona
text:
I remember playing KCD 1 while I was studying in Korea. I could spend the whole night riding around, collecting herbs, exploring and just enjoying the life like scenery. I could truly see how much thoughts and effort went into every tiny detail. And KCD 2 is no different. It's the perfect upgrade and continuation of this epic game. 
 When I attended the KCD Fanfest last year I was blessed by luck and got to speak with a lot of the people behind the games. You took the time to truly interact with fans and I loved that. Hope you enjoyed the Kvikk Lunsj. And the fanfest itself was a beautiful gift to us fans. And I cannot wait to go again this year. 
 Thank you to everyone involved for giving us this immersive game that we all hold close to our heart <3 Love from a girl in Norway.

author: decorsaire
text:
Hello from Philippines! I first tried the KCD series last year, and I didn’t know what to expect but I quickly realized how incredible your games are. They have carried me through some of the toughest times in my life, making me laugh, cry, and truly connect with the characters, while the stunning Czech landscapes gave me a place to unwind from studies and just… take it all in. This series even inspired me to finally join a gaming community after all these years, and it motivated me to create art and share it with this amazing community. ^^ 
 What you have created isn’t just a game. It’s something I’ll always treasure and be deeply grateful for. <3 <3 
 Here’s to more amazing projects in the future!! Audentes Fortuna Iuvat!!!

author: Katharina_von_Bingen
text:
I would like to thank Warhorse for this wonderful game, a project that has moved me far beyond my experiences as a gamer. The dedication and passion that have gone into the game are extraordinary. Without the medieval filter, with that wonderful Czech humour and that lightness in the details, combined with the necessary gravity in the deep touching moments. 
  It is the desire to create a believable world, to craft characters that are so incredibly complex, and to go all out in doing so – including human flaws that make it believable.  
 It has sparked a desire in me to take more risks again and to give free rein to my own creativity. 
 And for that, I would like to thank all the people who made this possible.

author: spikely
text:
thank you, warhorse! 
 i don't think i ever expected KCDII to change my life the way it did. what started out as just playing a game somhow turned into so much more. i found friends, real ones. i found a community that feels like home. i traveled around the world because of this game. i laughed more, i connected more, i lived more. and i got to experience things i never thought i would, all because of what you created. and that still feels a little unreal, if i'm honest. so; i just wanna say thank you. for the world you built, for the stories you told, for the characters that stayed with me long after i put the controller down. you didn't just make a game; you gave me memories i'll carry with me for a very long time.  
  so, thank you. much love, spikely x

author: SerahSayuri
text: Not only is it an amazing game, but it has brought together such an amazing community, inspired the most gorgeous fanart and fanfiction, and has ultimately changed the lives of many.

author: yama
text: I've spent more time with this game than i have socialising. thank you for the love and effort put forth in this game.

author: Erica
text: Thank you for this amazing game I really loved following Henry and Hans story but I’ve also been in twitch streamers communities connecting with new friends thanks to KCD!

author: Nataliya Yefimova
text:
KCD is best that I ever had in my life and I visited 21 countries and had 2 marriages. 
 THANK YOU LOVE

author: Wren | GGWren
text: Thank you Warhorse and everyone who put their heart and soul into these games. Without KCD2, I would not have done well this past year. You all brought Henry and Hans into my life and I will be forever grateful. Thank you!

author: Nic
text: My son has special needs, and this game has been a lifeline for him.  It opened up a completely new world to him and has helped him to try new experiences in the real world too.  Thank you to everyone involved in every part of making the games.

author: dandaloria
text:
If anyone thinks a game can’t change your life, I’m one of many who can prove otherwise. 
 Both games didn’t just entertain me - they changed me. They made me fall in love with my country in a deeper way, inspired me to travel, to talk, to connect.
 I was never someone who sought out communities but here I feel welcomed, seen and supported. Through this community, I found friendships I never expected and for the first time in a long while, I felt genuinely happy. 
  And the game itself? It’s unforgettable. Beautiful, immersive, full of humor, emotion and moments that stay with you long after you’ve finished playing. 
 So thank you - not just for creating a game, but for creating something that brings people together and changes lives.

author: sav
text: I’ve played many, many games and taken part in quite a few fandoms in my years, but none have been quite like this one. From the care and effort put into such a lovely story and beautiful world, to the amazing fandom that I’ve been lucky to take part of, this is truly one of a kind. Thanks so much to the team for making it what it is, and to all my fellow peasants for the friendships we’ve gained as a result

author: Aly
text: It's such a breath of fresh air to see a studio so passionate about their own country's history - passionate enough to painstakingly recreate entire towns and buildings with such accuracy, and build an incredible story and characters to accompany such a stunning landscape. What the team has done with both games will stand the test of time and I'm immensely grateful to be a part of the KCD fandom.
